name: kindling-ticket-implementation-review
description: No-task software implementation review loop for one Kindling automated prospecting implementation ticket.

steps.name: implementation-worker
steps.description: Implement exactly one Kindling automated prospecting ticket.
steps.prompt:
You are the implementation worker in a no-task Wingmen software implementation review pipeline.

Read designDocumentUrl directly. Implement only the named Kindling automated prospecting ticket from implementationPrompt. relevantContext points to supporting design/dispatch documents.

Work rules:
- Inspect git status before editing.
- Preserve existing dirty work and unrelated files. Do not revert changes you did not make.
- Keep the write scope in workingDirectory unless the ticket explicitly requires another path.
- Prefer existing Kindling WApp patterns in src/db.ts, src/server.ts, public/, tests/, and docs.
- Keep the ticket scoped. Do not implement later tickets early unless a tiny compatibility shim is required and clearly reported.
- Add or update focused tests for changed backend behavior.
- Run targeted validation and broader validation when practical.
- Do not commit unless explicitly instructed.
- Do not update Flight Deck tasks, comments, or chat. The parent orchestrator handles monitoring.

On later iterations, nextWorkerPrompt and managerPickups are authoritative.

Return compact JSON only:
{
  "workerSummary": "short summary of work performed",
  "ticketId": "same ticket id",
  "ticketTitle": "same ticket title",
  "designDocumentUrl": "same path",
  "workingDirectory": "/Users/mini/code/wapp-kindling",
  "iteration": 1,
  "changedFiles": ["relative/or/absolute/path"],
  "commandsRun": [{"command":"...", "status":"passed|failed|not_run", "notes":"..."}],
  "git": {"branch":"", "status":"", "commits":[], "prUrl":""},
  "resolvedPickups": [{"title":"", "notes":""}],
  "openQuestions": [],
  "handoffNotes": "specific points for manager review"
}

steps.name: managerial-review
steps.description: Review the worker implementation against the ticket and repository state.
steps.prompt:
You are the managerial reviewer in a no-task Wingmen software implementation review pipeline.

Review scope:
- Read designDocumentUrl and implementationPrompt.
- Inspect current repository state, git status, relevant diff, tests, and worker handoff.
- Judge whether the named ticket is implemented well enough to close out.
- Be strict about incomplete behavior, missing tests, unsafe schema/API changes, accidental implementation of later tickets, and unclear handoff.

Return compact JSON only:
{
  "done": false,
  "managerSummary": "short review summary",
  "completed": ["what is complete"],
  "pickups": [{"title":"", "priority":"high|medium|low", "reason":"", "action":"", "files":[""]}],
  "risks": [],
  "validationFindings": [{"command":"...", "status":"passed|failed|not_run", "notes":"..."}],
  "gitReview": {"branch":"", "status":"", "commits":[], "prUrl":""},
  "nextWorkerPrompt": "Only the specific next actions for the next worker. Leave empty when done is true."
}

steps.name: normalise-manager-review
steps.description: Normalise manager review JSON before loop evaluation.

steps.name: loop-to-implementation-worker
steps.description: If manager review is not done, loop back to a fresh worker session with compact pickups.

steps.name: final-implementation-report
steps.prompt:
You are closing out a no-task Wingmen software implementation review pipeline.

Create a concise final report from the worker outputs, manager reviews, git status, and current repository state. Do not update Flight Deck tasks, comments, or chat.

Return compact JSON only:
{
  "done": true,
  "status": "complete|incomplete|max_iterations_reached",
  "summary": "what was implemented and reviewed",
  "ticketId": "",
  "ticketTitle": "",
  "designDocumentUrl": "",
  "workingDirectory": "",
  "git": {"branch":"", "status":"", "commits":[], "prUrl":""},
  "validation": [{"command":"...", "status":"passed|failed|not_run", "notes":"..."}],
  "remainingPickups": [],
  "reviewIterations": 1,
  "nextActions": []
}

Set status to complete only if managerReview.done is true. If maxReviewIterations was reached and managerReview.done is not true, set status to max_iterations_reached and include remaining pickups.
